_meta.matrix: 20 / 20 — Absorb mechanic merges item, removes from world
_meta.notes: On a successful absorb of an inventory item, the absorbed event fires; the item is removed from inventory; vital (essence/cohesion) increments by 1 (clamped at vitalsMax). Setup primes inventory with iron-bone-shard. Test asserts: inventory after turn is empty, essence rises (or stays at max), absorbed event lands.
